summary: Homepage performance recovered slightly (67 → 71) but LCP remains critically slow at 7.7 s and the score stays well below 85; /projects and /projects/note-structurer both recovered meaningfully. The /about page remains a bare placeholder with no nav or footer — unchanged.

visual_findings: Page contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on an otherwise near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, four project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar) in a 2-column desktop grid, and a dark contact footer — all content visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, a two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 3/5 passing' badge, a dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 7.7 s, performance 71, persistently below 85): preload or optimize the hero image, serve it in WebP/AVIF, and eliminate render-blocking resources above the fold — this has been the single highest-impact unresolved issue for multiple consecutive audits.
issue_title: Homepage performance persistently below 85: score 71, LCP 7.7 s — no improvement trend
issue_body:
## Homepage performance remains critically slow

The homepage (`/`) scored 71 on today's mobile Lighthouse audit, with LCP at 7,665 ms. While this is a minor uptick from yesterday's 67, the score remains well below the 85 threshold and LCP is effectively unchanged (7,584 → 7,665 ms). This is a persistent multi-audit regression with no meaningful improvement trend.

### Current metrics (mobile)
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 71 | +4 pts (within jitter) |
| LCP | 7,665 ms | +81 ms (effectively flat) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 97 ms | stable |

### Other open issues
- `/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text only, no nav/footer); SEO score 83, below the 85 threshold — unchanged across multiple audits.

### Suggested fixes for `/`
1. Preload the hero image (LCP element) with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`.
2. Serve the hero in a next-gen format (WebP/AVIF) sized for mobile viewports.
3. Defer or remove render-blocking scripts/stylesheets above the fold.
4. Consider lazy-loading below-the-fold sections to reduce initial paint cost.

### Note
`/projects`, `/projects/note-structurer`, and `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue` all recovered to healthy scores today — yesterday's regressions on those pages appear to have been transient (likely a network/measurement spike).
